violations.text: Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Food was observed uncovered in the low boy unit in the back room. Food must be covered during storage to prevent miscellaneous sources of contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The countertop below the cappuccino machine is in poor repair. Tile is chipped. Countertop can no longer be effectively cleaned. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2025

Cheese, bacon, and sausage were observed not marked with the date of preparation in the kitchen low boy and walk-in cooler. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The countertops in the front area are in poor repair. Tile countertop under coffee machine and bakery display are cracked and the countertop is fragmented. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

Granola bars, packaged in the food establishment, are lacking the business name/address on the labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023

Banana bread packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. The person in charge put the banana bread in the display case at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023
The insect light trap is installed above the prep sink in the kitchen. Insect control devices must not be installed above prep areas. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2023
